response.justification: Strong match on experience depth (10+ years vs 6+ required) and primary stack alignment (TypeScript, Node.js, React). Current role at re:cinq directly covers AI-agent infrastructure, a required skill. Full-stack capability is well-demonstrated across backend, frontend, and cloud platforms. Main gaps are lack of explicit mention of Nest.js, Jest/Vitest/Playwright testing frameworks, and no documented authentication/authorization/security expertise—likely resume omissions rather than skill gaps given strong testing and TDD emphasis throughout history.
strengths: Exceeds experience requirement with 10+ years fullstack development; currently staff engineer with AI-agent infrastructure focus
Direct expertise in primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS CDK, MongoDB, and Kubernetes
Demonstrated testing culture and TDD commitment; open-source track record shows deep technical ownership
concerns: Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned despite extensive TypeScript/Node.js background
Specific testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not listed in skills section
No documented background in authentication, authorization, or security best-practices

key_factors.factor: AI agent development and infrastructure experience
Full-stack capability with primary tech stack alignment
Missing explicit framework and security documentation
